title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PROVINCE OF WESTERN SAMAR TO SAMAR

chunks.text:
H. No. 17094 / 65 OG No. 49, 13564 (December 8, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5650, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PROVINCE OF WESTERN SAMAR TO SAMAR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Province of Western Samar is hereby changed to Samar.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1969.
